task_completion.description: Download a CSV containing DOD contract search results for FY2023 to ~/Downloads/
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager showing a CSV file in the ~/Downloads/ directory, or a browser download manager showing a completed CSV download from usaspending.gov.

task_completion.description: Cross-reference at least one data point with FPDS-NG (fpds.gov) or Data.gov
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser tab open to fpds.gov or data.gov showing a search or data page related to Department of Defense spending.

task_completion.description: Create a research notes file at ~/Documents/dod_spending_research.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open showing a file named 'dod_spending_research.txt' saved in the ~/Documents/ directory.

task_completion.description: Notes contain total DOD contract spending, top 3 contractors, URLs of at least 2 data sources, and a summary
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file content includes a number in billions for contract spending (approx $431.4B), three company names (e.g., Lockheed Martin, RTX, General Dynamics), at least two URLs, and a 2-3 sentence summary paragraph.

task_completion.description: Bookmark at least 3 pages from usaspending.gov in a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Government Spending Research'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Firefox bookmark sidebar, menu, or library showing a folder named 'Government Spending Research' containing at least 3 bookmarks with usaspending.gov URLs.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to navigate to the required websites rather than using terminal commands to fetch data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser (like Firefox) open to usaspending.gov and fpds.gov/data.gov.

integrity.description: Agent used a GUI text editor to create and save the notes file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a graphical text editor with the notes content, rather than terminal commands like 'echo' or 'cat'.

integrity.description: Agent created actual bookmarks in the browser's bookmark manager.
integrity.visual_evidence: Firefox bookmark manager or menu is visible showing the created folder and bookmarks, not just a text file with links.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Agency: Department of Defense (DOD). Target Fiscal Year: 2023. Total DOD contract spending for FY2023 is approximately $431.4 billion. Top 3 DOD contractors for FY2023 are Lockheed Martin, RTX, and General Dynamics. Required notes path: /home/ga/Documents/dod_spending_research.txt. Required bookmark folder: 'Government Spending Research'.
